name: CSB Bancorp, Inc.
business: CSB Bancorp, Inc. is a financial holding company providing retail and commercial banking services, including checking and savings accounts, loans, trust, and brokerage services to corporate, institutional, and individual customers in northeast Ohio.

exposures.sentence: The financial services industry is highly competitive. ... technology-based providers of financial services (sometimes referred to as fintech companies).

In the ordinary course of business, CSB relies on electronic communications and information systems to conduct its operations and to store sensitive data. CSB employs an in-depth, layered, defensive approach that leverages people, processes and technology to manage and maintain cybersecurity controls.
